title: Classic Falafel Wrap
description: A flavorful and crunchy Middle Eastern-inspired wrap filled with crispy falafel, fresh veggies, and creamy tahini sauce.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium-high heat.
2. Cook the falafel according to package instructions.
3. Warm the wrap in the microwave for 10-15 seconds or in a dry skillet for a few seconds.
4. Spread a layer of tahini sauce on the wrap.
5. Add a few pieces of cooked falafel on top of the sauce.
6. Add diced tomato, cucumber, red onion, lettuce, and pickled turnip (if using).
7. Place a slice of American cheese on top (if using).
8. Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wrap.
9. Cut the wrap in half and serve immediately.
10. Enjoy your delicious and easy falafel wrap!
